{{Quote|It's beautiful. I've never seen anything like it.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy">''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy]]''</ref>}}
'''''Shadow Chaser''''' was a unique [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] produced by the [[Second Imperium]], for use by the [[Shadow Academy]]. Though she was a unique prototype, the ''Shadow Chaser'' was of a recognizably [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] design, probably standing in the same lineage as the [[Theta-class T-2c shuttle/Legends|''Theta''-class]] and [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class]] shuttles. Before she was stolen by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and his students, [[Brakiss]] considered the ''Shadow Chaser'' to be the Shadow Academy's finest small ship.

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|The ''Shadow Chaser'' is state-of-the-art. At the moment she's the only one of her kind.|[[Garowyn]]|<ref name="Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy" />}}
''Shadow Chaser'' was a small, compact ship, capable of carrying perhaps a dozen people. She had a sleek [[Hull/Legends|hull]] sheathed in nearly indestructible [[quantum-crystalline armor]], a technology pioneered in the [[Sun Crusher]], which gave her a distinctive oiled-silver gleam.

In the bow was a narrow cockpit with seats for two pilots and other flight crew, and the stern of the ship enclosed a small engine room, but most of the hull was taken up by a single main cabin, which contained passenger seating, with a series of [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]] in the aft bulkhead. Each of these could carry one person, but for security reasons, their homing beacon signals were encoded in a way that only the Shadow Academy could decrypt.

Other onboard amenities included several sleeping bunks and a small galley area, which were either located in the rear part of the main cabin, or else along the corridor leading aft to the engine room. There may also have been a separate cargo hold, though it is possible that the main cabin served this function as well.

The ship was armed with [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] in retractable turrets, and she had [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]] in addition to her nearly impregnable hull armor.

==History==
{{Quote|But we brought the Shadow Academy's best ship back with us. And you should see the design. State-of-the-art. Not like any of the models in the manuals, Dad!|[[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]|<ref name="Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy" />}}
The ''Shadow Chaser'' was originally piloted by a [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] named [[Garowyn]], who used it to ferry Imperial supplies to the [[Great Canyon Clan]] on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]], as well as to transport new [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] recruits from her homeworld to the [[Shadow Academy]]. However, the ship was stolen when [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]], posing as promising new recruits for the Shadow Academy, threw Garowyn into one of the ''Shadow Chaser''{{'s}} escape pods and jettisoned it.

Skywalker and Tenel Ka planned to use the ship to gain access to the Shadow Academy and rescue [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], his twin sister [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina]], and [[Lowbacca]] the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]], who had been unwillingly recruited as students there. When the ''Shadow Chaser'' came out of hyperspace on the course pre-programmed in by Garowyn, the Shadow Academy de-cloaked in front of her.

Skywalker and Tenel Ka guided the craft into one of the Shadow Academy's docking bays and encountered the Solo twins, Lowbacca, and a reprogrammed [[M-TD]]. After a confrontation with [[Brakiss]] and [[Tamith Kai]], they escaped aboard the ''Shadow Chaser'' and brought it to the [[Jedi Praxeum]] at [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. After expressing her thanks to Skywalker for rescuing her children, [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] allowed Skywalker to keep the shuttle, telling him that he deserved it, and reasoning that the Academy could use a fast ship.

Subsequently, the ''Shadow Chaser'' was used as a transport by the Jedi Academy. Garowyn would later try unsuccessfully to recover her "one joy" from [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and Lowbacca on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], but the shuttle did not see action during the Second Imperium's [[Third Battle of Yavin|attack]] on Yavin 4, due to being trapped inside a hangar bay.

The ''Shadow Chaser'' was later used by Luke Skywalker to transport [[Raynar Thul]] to his family's merchant fleet.<ref name="Diversity Alliance">''[[Young Jedi Knights: Diversity Alliance]]''</ref>
